name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13399 White】This Rosalie coin purse is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue collection, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas with vibrant tones to cleverly pay homage to the distinctive style of Japanese artist Takashi Murakami. The compact structure features a rounded flap and snap closure, with an internal space including a coin purse with a Monogram pull tab. 8 x 2.5 x 11 cm (H x W x D)
